cover.subtitle:
기병에 진 고려가,
새로 만든 특수 부대.
cover.imagePrompt: 12th century Goryeo dynasty illustration. ONE Korean general (Yun Gwan) on horseback in lamellar armor with a fur-trimmed helmet, leading three groups of soldiers: cavalry with bows (sin-gi-gun), infantry with spears (sin-bo-gun), and Buddhist monk-warriors with staves (hang-ma-gun). Snowy northern mountain landscape (East Asia 9 fortresses region). Color: steel-gray + crimson + ink-black. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO READABLE BANNERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

items.title: 북진의 한계
items.desc: 기병 전력 한계로 영토 확장 좌절.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험은 별무반 3부대 구성(신기군 기병·신보군 보병·항마군 승려), 윤관 동북 9성 축조와 1년 후 반환, 거란(서희·강감찬) vs 여진(윤관) 대응 비교 빈출.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: three small soldier silhouettes in a row — one mounted, one on foot with spear, one in monk's robe with staff — suggesting the three units of Byeolmuban. Cream #F2EDE3 base + amber #C77B3D accent. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image.
